title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.235 - Liable on bond for acts of his deputies
text:
483.235.  Liable on bond for acts of his deputies. — The clerk of the supreme court shall be liable on his official bond for the acts of his deputies in the discharge of their duties as such.
(RSMo 1939 § 13280, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11661; 1919 § 2107; 1909 § 2670 
Effective 1-02-79
